div.style: font-family: 'Space Mono', monospace; background: transparent; color: #ffffff; padding: 0.5rem 0 2rem; max-width: 860px; margin: 0 auto;
display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px; margin:2rem 0; color:rgba(255,75,75,0.4); font-size:10px; font-family:'Space Mono', monospace; letter-spacing:3px;

span.style: flex:1; height:1px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255,75,75,0.3), transparent); display:block;
flex:1; height:1px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(255,75,75,0.3), transparent); display:block;

div.style: font-family:'Space Mono', monospace; font-size:11px; color:#ff4b4b; letter-spacing:3px; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:1rem; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;
background:rgba(255,75,75,0.04); border:1px solid rgba(255,75,75,0.15); border-radius:10px; padding:1.2rem;
font-family:'Syne', sans-serif; font-weight:700; font-size:13px; color:#ffd166; margin-bottom:6px; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px;
font-family:'Space Mono', monospace; font-size:11px; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5); line-height:1.6;

div.div: Clean TypeScript handler for Discord slash commands and interactions.
